name: Chrometco Limited
summary: Chrometco Limited, a mineral exploration company, engages in the exploration and mining of mineral properties. It primarily focuses on chrome, platinum, copper, cobalt, nickel, and manganese ores, as well as other base metals. The company has chrome and platinum prospects and operations in the North West province of South Africa. Chrometco Limited is based in Johannesburg, South Africa. Chrometco Limited is a subsidiary of Sail Holdings Pty Ltd.
